column1: # Curated allowlist only. No wildcard exports from vault Notes.
# ── Core behavioral layer (source of truth: clawd workspace → jarvOS core/) ──
# NOTE: core/AGENTS.md in the public repo is the PORTABLE version (no OpenClaw refs).
# It is maintained directly in the public repo, NOT synced from clawd/AGENTS.md.
# Do NOT add a mapping for AGENTS.md here — it would overwrite the portable version.
# NOTE: These docs are mirrored into the clawd repo so unattended cron runs do not
# depend on macOS TCC permissions for vault access.
# ── PMS templates (source of truth: public repo, edited directly) ──
# These are maintained directly in the public repo under core/pms/.
# No sync mapping needed — they don't have a clawd workspace source.
# ── Governance (source of truth: public repo, edited directly) ──
# Maintained directly in the public repo under core/governance/.
# ── Legacy templates (kept for backward compat until fully migrated) ──
